title: FEQO 36 Pcs Orange Eucalyptus Stems Artificial Leaves Faux Eucalyptus Stems Branches 15 inch for Wedding Bouquet Home Decor
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Package include: 36 pcs artificial eucalyptus stems are included, a large quantity orange eucalyptus stems for vase and home decoration
Stem size: length of the eucalyptus stems about 15 inch, you can cut or twist the wire to adjust the artificial stems'length on your demand
Premium material: FEQO faux eucalyptus stems are made of premium plastic, in order to matching with other bouquets better, the eucalyptus stems are added with elastic wire

Well match: the orange eucalyptus stems with fake leaves are great for both single stem vase decor and branches decor, ideal for living room, office and banquet, add lively color to your party and wedding, the eucalyptus stems also can be used to DIY flowers arrangements, bouquets, centerpieces and so on

Wide application: the artificial eucalyptus stems decor are great for celebrations, anniversaries, parties and wedding; various of color leaves are ideal choice for your home decor, suitable for fall harvest, Thanksgiving, Spring and Christmas party
description: FEQO 36 Pcs Orange Eucalyptus Stems Artificial Eucalyptus Leaves Decor Eucalyptus Branches Fake Eucalyptus with Fake Leaves 15 inch Faux Eucalyptus Stem for Vase Wedding Bouquet Home
